description: Legal document regarding the inheritance of the late David Ṣanuaʿ. In Hebrew. Location: Cairo. Dated: End of Sivan 5524 AM = June 1764 CE. Among the surviving relatives are: Avraham Ṣanuaʿ (the eldest son) and his widow Ḥavīva bt. Moshe Zayn, whose ketubba is valued at 2,000 gold maḥbūb. Ḥabība bt. Moshe Zayn was not the mother of Avraham Ṣanuaʿ given that he is referenced as: "בנו הגדול ה׳׳ר אברהם צנוע יצ׳׳ו מאשה אחרת". Therefore, David Ṣanuaʿ was either previously divorced or a widower who had a second marriage to Ḥabība .The deed has two elaborate signatures: the one on the right may be Yahuda[?] _____a[?] and the left reads clearly as Avraham Tornaqa. MCD.
description_he: מסמך משפטי בעניין ירושת דוד צנוע המנוח; בעברית; מקום: קהיר; תאריך: סוף סיון תקכ'ד = יוני 1764 לספירה; בין הנוכחים: אברהם צנוע בנו הבכור ואלמנתו חביבה בת משה זין
